name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Get involved
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:

Hello, We are on the cusp of confirming Representative Deb Haaland to head the Department of the Interior in D.C. At home, it's important that we are also actively engaging in the process to select her successor in the House. The work has already begun here in Bernalillo County, but it's not too late to get involved. You can be a leader and elector for the Democratic Party of Bernalillo County and the Democratic Party of New Mexico. | [DOWNLOAD INFO VIDEO](https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75afde/43d8135f/647c47f7/51064e92/1110301014/VEsE/?g=EoemE2V4ADlaKjl2zM0Tbw "https://bernalillodems.org/wp-content/uploads/SCC-1.mov")

[DECLARE YOUR CANDIDACY](https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75afde/43d8135f/647c47f7/51064e94/1110301014/VEsC/?g=EoemE2V4ADlaKjl2zM0Tbw "https://bernalillodems.org/2021-declaration-of-candidacy/")

-- Martin

subject: checking in before you go to bed

body:
Hi there,
If Republicans flip a single Senate seat, they'll take back the majority.
Maggie won her last race by a razor-thin 1,017 votes and now Republicans are making her a top target.**Mitch McConnell is recruiting his handpicked candidate to run against her, and a recent poll shows Maggie DOWN by two points.**
We check in on our fundraising numbers every single day because we know we need to talk to every voter and inoculate against Republicans' attacks. We have to -- it's the only way we can protect this seat.
The bad news is, despite the ramp up in GOP attacks, we're actually seeing a _dip_ in our fundraising. name: Team Hagerty
subject: Support Our Communities
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-mjyiyz-fuutjhhtj-u/) March 2, 2020 **Support Your Local Communities** One year ago, today, severe storms devasted parts of middle Tennessee. Communities across our state have dealt with unforeseen challenges like tornados, snowstorms, the impact of COVID-19 and many more, but we continue to adapt and innovate to be successful. Small businesses are the backbone of Tennessee's economy, and in order for our communities to thrive and recover from the impact of the events over the past year, we need to do everything we can to support them. That means reaching out to your neighbor, supporting a small business in your community and looking for new ways to bolster our hometown. Join Team Hagerty and support your local community! **We Must Build The Wall** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mjyiyz-fuutjhhtj-r/) Joe Biden and the radical Democrats are failing the American people by not securing our southern border. Right now, there is an immigration crisis impacting our border communities and the country as a whole. The Biden Administration's weak immigration policies will hurt hard-working Americans. It's time we open our schools, not our borders. We need to focus on getting Americans back to work and creating an environment for Americans to recover from the impact of COVID-19. But, Joe Biden and the Democrats would rather dismantle ICE's ability to enforce our immigration laws at the expense of the American people. It's wrong. Bill will continue to stand up for the rule of law and fight to ensure our border patrol agents have the tools they need to secure our borders. **Holding Communist China Accountable** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mjyiyz-fuutjhhtj-y/) There is no doubt that China is our adversary - militarily, diplomatically and economically. The Communist Regime continues to take American jobs, steal our intellectual property and intimidate our allies. It is past time that we held them accountable, but Joe Biden and his Administration repeatedly side with Communist China - putting the needs of Americans last on his list of priorities.Bill understands the genuine threat posed by China and will do everything in his power to hold them to account. **Conservative Political Action Conference 2021** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mjyiyz-fuutjhhtj-j/) This weekend, conservatives from across the country joined together for the Conservative Political Action Conference in Orlando, Florida. During the conference, President Trump spoke about the threat posed by radical Democrats, who continue to push our country closer and closer to socialism. President Trump was exactly right in saying the only thing that will preserve our freedom and keep our country great is putting the needs of Americans first. Bill believes the American people come first today, tomorrow and every day, and will always fight for President Trump's America First agenda. **Women's History Month** This week marks the beginning of Women's History Month, a time to recognize and honor the achievements of the women who have shaped our country. From Dolly Parton to Pat Summitt to Tennessee's first female Senator, Marsha Blackburn, Tennessee has no shortage of barrier-breaking women who have made history. As a father, husband and son, Bill will always support and work alongside the strong conservative women in our state and across the country. [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mjyiyz-fuutjhhtj-t/)[](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mjyiyz-fuutjhhtj-i/)[](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mjyiyz-fuutjhhtj-d/)[](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mjyiyz-fuutjhhtj-h/)[](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-mjyiyz-fuutjhhtj-k/) Team Hagerty
P.O. Box 150748
Nashville, TN 37215 [ Share ](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-fb-mjyiyz-fuutjhhtj-o/) [ Tweet ](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-tw-mjyiyz-fuutjhhtj-b/) [ Forward ](https://hfs.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-fuutjhhtj-76178D70-mjyiyz-l-m) [Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-mjyiyz-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-c) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-u-mjyiyz-fuutjhhtj-q/)
---

# Welcome, Raquelle!
I am so excited to introduce the newest addition to Miya’s team, Raquelle Pendleton! Raquelle is a Legislative Research Attorney at the Hawaii State Legislature & she has also been producing content for local businesses. As Chief Marketing Officer, she will be developing business partnerships, managing social media strategy, and planning promotional events. I look forward to working with her to continue growing this brand into a community! <3, Elise
[](https://houseofmiya.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=77c80ca1581e9062c58c6a90e&id=65d4b6c78a&e=4d625d78d1)

name: Team Cammack
subject: H.R. 1 is a dumpster fire
body:
The far-left is attempting to jeopardize our elections
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Cmq4zV4TVSCaKf0NOfKq_mwtwFPvypb1uDEQgr1Xx3e4Ezkx9snzIRaJt144wosQHVIevjatDLhJomn4JurhpL53VBW4FrAUE4d-QQn-oXXdqJh1ROjmHfgftE0BkGOW5feLkU4rEQkAoHS_wLeVGo7-W1G4rPKo1yeluKvr8yY=&c=plJn41TY5z5UoCN5ohTXqtrnkA03874q_8Dtqc_tBgQHUkEdruGN4g==&ch=wJqIlt3aQf0pnGKPHZLPygK2OVzRTsxID312byHPe-K4z6rlyCU1zw==)
---
| Patriot,
The American people are questioning the integrity of our elections, and the far-left is now trying to fundamentally change our election system in the new H.R. 1 bill. This massive election reform bill is not what the American people want, which means it's imperative we ensure our voices are heard.
---
| | | [STAND UP AGAINST H.R. 1](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Cmq4zV4TVSCaKf0NOfKq_mwtwFPvypb1uDEQgr1Xx3e4Ezkx9snzIRaJt144wosQHVIevjatDLhJomn4JurhpL53VBW4FrAUE4d-QQn-oXXdqJh1ROjmHfgftE0BkGOW5feLkU4rEQkAoHS_wLeVGo7-W1G4rPKo1yeluKvr8yY=&c=plJn41TY5z5UoCN5ohTXqtrnkA03874q_8Dtqc_tBgQHUkEdruGN4g==&ch=wJqIlt3aQf0pnGKPHZLPygK2OVzRTsxID312byHPe-K4z6rlyCU1zw==)
---
| What would H.R. 1 look like if passed?

* Nationalizes campaigns
* Invalidates state voter ID laws
* Degrades voter rolls by automatically registering all individuals on state and federal databases
* Provides public funding for campaigns (up to $7 million per campaign)
* Expands government censorship of political campaigns and political activity
* Allows Washington bureaucrats to redraw congressional districts and create voter qualifications
* And more...

The American people should be confident in their elections because they are integral to our system of government. Extensive election reform passed in a partisan manner will only further erode the confidence Americans have in our elections.
We must hold the liberals in Congress accountable to all Americans. We cannot pass election reform without the consent of the citizens that constitute our great nation. It is imperative we send the message to Washington that the American people must be heard when it comes to our elections. [Will you stand with Kat against H.R. 1?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Cmq4zV4TVSCaKf0NOfKq_mwtwFPvypb1uDEQgr1Xx3e4Ezkx9snzIRaJt144wosQHVIevjatDLhJomn4JurhpL53VBW4FrAUE4d-QQn-oXXdqJh1ROjmHfgftE0BkGOW5feLkU4rEQkAoHS_wLeVGo7-W1G4rPKo1yeluKvr8yY=&c=plJn41TY5z5UoCN5ohTXqtrnkA03874q_8Dtqc_tBgQHUkEdruGN4g==&ch=wJqIlt3aQf0pnGKPHZLPygK2OVzRTsxID312byHPe-K4z6rlyCU1zw==)
---

clean_body: The far-left is attempting to jeopardize our elections | | | | | | == | Patriot, The American people are questioning the integrity of our elections, and the far-left is now trying to fundamentally change our election system in the new H.R. 1 bill. This massive election reform bill is not what the American people want, which means it's imperative we ensure our voices are heard. | | | == | What would H.R. 1 look like if passed? Nationalizes campaigns Invalidates state voter ID laws Degrades voter rolls by automatically registering all individuals on state and federal databases Provides public funding for campaigns (up to $7 million per campaign) Expands government censorship of political campaigns and political activity Allows Washington bureaucrats to redraw congressional districts and create voter qualifications * And more... The American people should be confident in their elections because they are integral to our system of government. Extensive election reform passed in a partisan manner will only further erode the confidence Americans have in our elections. We must hold the liberals in Congress accountable to all Americans. We cannot pass election reform without the consent of the citizens that constitute our great nation. It is imperative we send the message to Washington that the American people must be heard when it comes to our elections. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thanks for your support! For Florida, Team Cammack | | | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: A Line Must Be Drawn
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES ACTION AND NOT
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats passed the
so-called Equality Act and now the bill heads to the Senate.

It must be stopped!

If you aren't familiar with this dangerous
legislation, you need to understand what it will do and take
immediate action to urge your representatives to oppose it.

Click here to send an instant message to your
senators.

Everything we know about sexual differentiation
between men and women tells us that it begins at the chromosomal
level from the moment of conception. Sexual difference is
inscribed in our genetic code. The Equality Act redefines this
basic fact about what it means to be human - largely at the
expense of women.

For example, if a biological man identifies as a
woman, he would be considered female under this legislation. This
would allow men to compete with women in sports and allow men to
use women's restrooms across the country.

But there's more. The legislation would also:

Force doctors to provide sex-change procedures to
minors
Force battered women's shelters to allow biological
men in alongside traumatized women
Classify objections to abortion as "pregnancy"
discrimination

This legislation is not about achieving equality;
it's about acquiring the power to silence dissenting views.

Please urge your Senators to oppose the Equality
Act.

The Left's radical position was on full display when
Senator Rand Paul (R-KY) questioned Dr. Rachel Levine, President
Biden's nominee for assistant Health and Human Services
secretary.

"Do you support the government intervening to
override the parent's consent to give a child puberty blockers,
cross-sex hormones, and/or amputation surgery of breasts and
genitalia?," asked Senator Paul.

Dr. Levine gave a non-answer saying, "Senator,
transgender medicine is a very complex and nuanced field."

It is NOT complex or nuanced. It's a direct threat
to our nation's children and it's WRONG!

We can't ignore this threat. Every freedom-loving
American needs to take two minutes to contact their senators.

The bill has passed the House, and President Biden
has promised to sign it into law, leaving the Senate as the last
hurdle.

The question is whether Democrats will retain the
60-vote requirement to end filibusters of legislation, and if so,
whether they can get 50 votes with the help of Vice President
Vice Kamala Harris.

We must do everything we can to speak out against
this now.

Please send a message to your senators.

Together, we can stop this madness and protect the
basic values that are the backbone of our society.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Action

SEND A MESSAGE

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Action300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Action is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies in Washington
and that helps elect principled candidates to the U.S. Senate.

Contributions are not deductible for federal income
tax purposes. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
report the name, address, employer and occupation of all whose
contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.
Federal law allows Senate Conservatives Action to accept
unlimited contributions from any U.S. citizen or foreign national
with permanent resident status in the United States, and from any
U.S. corporation or domestic U.S. subsidiary. Donors may not be
federal contractors.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES ACTION AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATEACTION.COM

body:

| Peter,
We are on high alert as the House will vote on H.R. 1, or the "For the People" Act. If you're not familiar, this bill will gut election integrity by federalizing our elections, using taxpayer dollars to fund campaigns, banning voter ID laws, and mandating universal mail-in voting across the country.
---
| | | [PROTECT OUR ELECTIONS](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xiu2QRK15eVAf4lwsyZpyB5IcthdIS0Ikb6McJxPYAUB8AGJzY_RgX6MBNljstIOB-AnDr_UjGV_AACvV-dXDjnpXo4gyGIbPJJqRFeqfdgJRXIO4Yvr7egNJxQ3ma_ZoVVEh0HOW3LBK72NsTafDq18taGlv8pclifue1r__E8=&c=rNXybeq-vIQQ3ytTx6OxcGRYdnZvSuWfFIyQZmguQVivB5i6qOnoQA==&ch=aJRLERh5ILSjimxHIA-oWwINBnF233iT5h3hxnNwD3Pb8YGd0jlMZw==)
---
| Americans are very concerned with election integrity, and rightfully so. Instead of safeguarding our elections from fraud, the Democrats want to make it easier. They want Washington bureaucrats in the Swamp to oversee the election process and redraw districts to their advantage.
Now is the time to step up. If we are going to save our country, we need to have safe and fair elections DETERMINED BY THE PEOPLE, not the ruling class in Washington.
If you can, we need you to rush in your support so that Matt Gaetz can stand and fight for election integrity. We can defeat this bill and save our elections, but we need the support of Patriots like you!

In the 2020 election, we saw the radical Democrats jam through universal mail-in voting in many states and fought tooth-and-nail against voter ID laws and signature verification. They even bragged about their "cabal" in Time Magazine.

Democrats know they have to change the rules in order to win, even if it undermines the integrity of the elections. == For our country, Matt Gaetz Political Team | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2021 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you opted in at our website. Friends of Matt Gaetz | == | | Friends of Matt Gaetz | PO Box 168, Mary Ester, FL 32569 | | Sent by mailto:info@mattgaetzforflorida.com

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Our chance to take action on gun safety →
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

I recently reintroduced a bill to require background checks on all firearm sales. _**Peter — we have a unique opportunity here.**_

This could be the first time in 27 years that both chambers pass legislation to help prevent gun violence.

As the chairman of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force and a gun owner and supporter of the Second Amendment, I know this signifies a major chance for actual bipartisan progress. [**_Add your name if you agree that it’s time for us to pass common sense gun safety legislation like having universal background checks._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25761381/274849638/-934855443?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjEzZGQwZi00ZDdjLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dVQPSvUr07kyiQqdsWyAQnYse7tZsNB1j2Mcog_6ZGQ=&emci=d61c0255-2e7c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=8613dd0f-4d7c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=2678920)

I am proud to work across the aisle and pass legislation that will keep guns out of the hands of people who may be a danger to themselves or others. Americans have been demanding action, and it’s time we take this step to respond.

There have been far too many tragedies associated with gun violence. Passing this bill is an effective measure in making our communities safer. I hope you join me in advocating for a bipartisan approach to addressing this huge problem in our country.

[**_If you feel similarly, add your name to support universal background checks on firearm sales →_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/25761383/274849639/-934855443?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjEzZGQwZi00ZDdjLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dVQPSvUr07kyiQqdsWyAQnYse7tZsNB1j2Mcog_6ZGQ=&emci=d61c0255-2e7c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=8613dd0f-4d7c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=2678920)

Thank you,

Mike

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20Makki?=
subject: See my SkyNews interview on Trump’s CPAC speech and my editorials in the Tampa Bay Times & Washington Examiner
body:
My Opinion Editorials in the Tampa Bay Times and Washington Examiner | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b1570e1944b3/happy-thanksgiving-from-milwaukee-3754450?e=c2296cffff)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope this email finds you well.

We just wrapped up CPAC 2021 where we heard most notably from former President Donald Trump and 2024 presidential hopefuls. There were many takeaways from President Trump’s speech, but most important was the need for a unified Republican Party, otherwise risking that we remain in the minority. On this topic, I wrote an editorial that was published in the _Washington Examiner_ last week (see link below) that discusses how the GOP can take back the majority in 2022.

Also below is an editorial I wrote for the _Tampa Bay Times_ on President Joe Biden failing our nation's children by siding with a core Democratic constituency, the teachers’ unions, as well as my interview with SkyNews discussing President Trump's CPAC speech.

1. **The Washington Examiner on February 22, titled, ‘How the GOP can win back Congress’ **

[L](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=53f553ac4e&e=c2296cffff "Link to the Article")[ink](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=3032e4577a&e=c2296cffff)

1. **The Tampa Bay Times on February 27, titled, ‘What kind of leader is Joe Biden?’ **

[Link](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=d3a68d2d17&e=c2296cffff)

2. **SkyNews interview on February 28 discussing President Trump's speech at CPAC**

[](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=7cbfc8b08c&e=c2296cffff)

[Link](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=6ef58eb92e&e=c2296cffff)

I would love to hear your thoughts, so please feel free to drop me a line.

To see my media appearances and opinion editorials, please follow me on:

**Facebook: Amanda Makki for Congress
Instagram: amandamakki
Twitter: @amandamakki**

Thank you!
Amanda Makki
---
| | | | | | | [](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=c635ef56c7&e=c2296cffff)

body:
This is odd -- Mitch McConnell is _personally_ recruiting his handpicked candidate to unseat Maggie Hassan (and flip the Senate back to Republican control!) but for some reason, our fundraising is falling off a cliff.
Maggie only won her last race by 1,017 votes so even a minor setback could cost us this seat._And the Senate majority._

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: DFL Extends Emergency Powers to a Year
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary_202103&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **We are 10 days away from hitting the One-Year Anniversary of Walz' unilateral declaration of Emergency Powers. In New York, Democrats are prepared to strip Governor Cuomo of his emergency powers this week. Can you believe it?!** That means that Reps Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard are more radical than a New York Democrat. Glad we are putting on the pressure in their districts. More on that in a bit. The lies from the Democrats have led to businesses being closed down, healthy people ordered to stay in their homes, youth athletes to wear masks while playing sports, AND Covid positive patients admitted back to long term care facilities. Our team is working around the clock to try and stop the one-year anniversary from happening. It's absolutely amazing that we are here right now! Almost makes one think there is something bigger, and more nefarious at play. **The only way to stop politicians from taking our liberties is to hit them where it hurts - putting our message right in front of their voters. Which is why we just hired two more doorknockers and moved them up into Con Artist Dave Lislegard's district. And that pressure is****putting him and Julie Sandstede on the Defense!** Did you see that both legislators wrote [guests columns](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=UzxBEzGoayeHd1WPFO-VsytmHVRx0LEvSE6MSwFr96izGKgJsEnl3sZoWzJc4RxN_veVZg0_UYzyS7XXZ0uryJz92gY7lxBPbYVJo8zkQuoO3MFJiGBCxrve_1mZ1QJn8OyrU7nWlnQUN0DYJN5YiO_i5CJmVCJJ_Koh798ayU6LEz-UlLNl8EYWjmQZHBA3&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary_202103&n=2) in the Hibbing paper trying to save face with their voters. From Dave Lislegard: _You’ve likely seen literature or heard radio**advertising from Action 4 Liberty** , a group based in the Twin Cities working day and night – during a time when our nation is already deeply divided – to agitate people, including those on the Iron Range._
## This means one thing. OUR PRESSURE IS WORKING!
We now have two different homes up north and I just hired another couple doorknockers. Our team is signing up new petition signers, talking to thousands of voters and distributing lit in all the neighborhoods. Even Dave Lislegard admits we are working around the clock to get our message out to voters. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary_202103&n=3) **Did you know that Julie Sandstede won her election by only 30 votes last November and President Trump won Dave Lislegard's district? By the time we're done with this, we'll have easily identified enough voters to flip those districts red!** Speaking of flipping districts, the Democrat machine is getting really worried that the legislature finally has a liberty champion who is willing to take the fight to them. They HATE our guy, Rep Erik Mortensen. Just last Thursday, Walz' rubber stamp and mask mandate cheerleader, Brad Tabke, announced he is running against Mort. Who announces a campaign this early? Looks like they have set our guy in the crosshairs. This battle is far too important to lose to the Democrat machine. We now know that Emergency Powers will be used and abused by tyrants. That's why we are working day and night to End Walz' Emergency Powers. And with Mort in office, we'll lead the fight to make sure it NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN! There are still more volunteer opportunities up in the Iron Range if you are looking to get more involved. Please [reach out](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary_202103&n=4) if you would like to join our field team to door knock. **If you don't have the time, your support means a lot to our team. We want to keep the momentum and continue holding these politicians accountable. We're quickly approaching the One-Year Anniversary of Walz' Emergency Powers. Let's STOP him from making them permanent.[Support our field operations today](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary_202103&n=5).** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary_202103&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary_202103&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=one_year_anniversary_202103&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Hold Joe Biden Accountable
body:
America is facing a worsening crisis of uncontrolled illegal immigration from the dangerously radical Biden Immigration Agenda!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Today, Judicial Watch is confronting our biggest, and I believe _most important_ set of challenges in 27 years.
They include but are not limited to our important lawsuits digging into Biden family corruption and radical Biden administration efforts to gut our laws against illegal immigration. And as they say, these are very big deals...which is why I hope you will **_[make your best donation to Judicial Watch right now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53059&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMDMxNDQzMjA=)_**.
Not surprisingly, Biden administration lawyers are already hard at work fighting our lawful open records requests in the courts. Plus, calls for legal and investigative assistance we are receiving from conservative groups around the country are _accelerating_.
Many concerned citizens and honest public officials are seeking our expert help to enforce the rule of law. Threats range from additional Leftist assaults on election integrity and Big Tech efforts to silence conservatives. And we continue the all-important fight for accountability in the seditious Deep State efforts to destroy the Trump presidency.
_I do not want to have to turn away even one important corruption, open government, illegal immigration or election integrity case_ as demands on us are at an all-time high. That is why **_[I hope you will make your best donation to Judicial Watch now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53059&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMDMxNDQzMjA=)_**.
With your support, we will:
* **Aggressively move forward with our Biden accountability lawsuits and investigations into Biden family corruption, plus more Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests concerning Biden administration unlawful moves to open our borders to a dangerous new wave of illegal immigration**.

* **Continue our legal challenges against illegal "sanctuary" policies that unlawfully prohibit local police from cooperating with federal immigration authorities**. The radical Biden immigration agenda makes our independent efforts in the courts to overturn illegal sanctuary policies - like our ongoing lawsuits against deadly sanctuary policies in **San Francisco** and **Santa Clara County, California** - _even more important_.

* **Add more resources to our highly successful election integrity work**. Voter fraud is aided by the failure of states to conform to the **National Voter Registration Act** requirement to clean their voter rolls. Combined with the failure of many states to require **Voter ID** at the polls and by mail makes it possible for ineligible individuals to vote. _We are currently pursuing more "clean the voter rolls" lawsuits against **Colorado** , **Illinois** , **North Carolina** and **Pennsylvania**_**...** _while at the same time keeping a close eye on Soros-funded groups pushing for "all mail-in" voting and ballot harvesting that further weaken safeguards against voter fraud_.

But there is much more to do in the coming days and months. Which is why I hope you will **_[make your best donation now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53059&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMDMxNDQzMjA=)_** to help us get the job done. Judicial Watch is the one conservative institution in Washington that Americans can rely on to stand firm for the rule of law.
We are conservative...we are independent...we hold _both_ Democrats _and_ Republicans accountable to the rule of law...and _we are fighting for you_! Thank you for your **_[support!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53059&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMDMxNDQzMjA=)_**
Sincerely,
Tom Fitton President

_Fact: More people live in Washington D.C. than the state of Wyoming._
And, _yet_ , residents of Wyoming, and every other state in the U.S., get full representation in Congress. The nearly 700,000 people who live in our nation's capital, however, are **denied **a vote in both the House and the Senate -- despite _paying federal taxes._
[**Will you ADD YOUR NAME to show Congress that Americans are ready to see Washington D.C. become a state?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/25765568/274867620/-1424117338?code=ESV&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fevery-single-vote%3Frefcode%3DX_030221_DCstatehoodJA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgzMzY4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjNjhmNGI5LTViN2MtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5_JT2ewZQ2IYb5YOGZqbmpMhtlspGSJ2Y8apaIWHBVY=&emci=1798f0d9-547c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=bc68f4b9-5b7c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=16080230)

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: [Look] Recap of February
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress |

It was a great month fighting for the people of Miami, small businesses, and the American Dream! Take a look at what happened... In fact, early in February, I also created the ‘Prosperity Center’ in Florida’s 27th District!

**The ‘Prosperity Center’ will assist in: **
* Helping you find a job if you don’t have one
* Offering to retrain those who want to switch industries
* Helping small businesses become service providers for the government

I’m fighting so everyone can pursue their own American Dream.

Peter,

|

name: Sen. Mark Warner
subject: An email about my new role as chair of the Senate Intelligence Committee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek,

With a new Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate, I recently became the chairman of the Senate Intelligence Committee. I'm proud to follow in the footsteps of my friend and mentor, former Virginia Senator John Warner (no relation) to become the first Virginian to chair a Senate committee in over a decade. The committee oversees the entire U.S. Intelligence Community: from the CIA to the Defense Intelligence Agency to the intelligence elements of our Armed Forces. Many of the brave men and women who serve in our intelligence community live and work here in Virginia.

**This is not a job I take lightly, especially given the events of the past four years.**

The previous administration spent their entire time in office undermining and politicizing the Intelligence Community, which threatens lasting damage to America's national security. Furthermore, in recent years we've seen an alarming rise in anti-government extremists and increasing cyber espionage conducted against the United States by hostile foreign actors.

In light of these grave threats, I have several top priorities for the Intel Committee:
1. **_Rebuild intelligence community agencies_** and departments that were understaffed and under-resourced in the previous administration.
2. **_Depoliticize our intelligence-gathering apparatus_** , so these tireless and patriotic public servants can stay above the partisan fray and focus on their jobs: safeguarding the American people.
3. **_Root out anti-government extremism_** , including the white nationalist militias that participated in the January 6th insurrection at our Capitol.
4. **_Strengthen America's cybersecurity capabilities_** so we never have a repeat of cyber attacks like the 2020 SolarWinds cyber espionage campaign.

I am honored to serve as Senate Intelligence chairman. **So, here is my promise to you, to all Virginians, and our career intelligence professionals on the front lines: I will not let you down.** To the best of my ability, I will work to rebuild and depoliticize our Intelligence Community, tackle extremism and foreign cyber espionage, and always strive to maintain the committee's reputation for bipartisan work to protect America's national security.

**[You can read more about my plans as Senate Intelligence Committee chairman in this recent article from _The New York Times_.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8d9/53d9897e/55226e9c/1c88debb/3758733507/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://snip.ly/fdbf6y")**

Thank you,
Sen. Mark Warner

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8d9/53d9897e/55226e9c/1c88deba/3758733507/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk3MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-donate2021?refcode=20210302_e_1_fl__971__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Team Cammack
subject: Let’s Celebrate Florida!
body:
176th anniversary
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GoN_1GW6n1frATktvw-nESDWFYZK9M4J-4vUHxbDoYUNd3kXtvOyb2GYquA-N4_OFPIbMKCRCMAeRHKS7O3jKpPHGTpBa__IJJChFuiqMNHNhPYC_K9MFh2jwnBjzcvdktT4q2lSMzm5fRlZ8KrVBf5hzXktTlixsWqMXI0pQkqNjhAf-XWrOK5rgA_AWRDz&c=5da0eRVu0i5SNJtE54UO9Wi1lmaTzHSrpqf2CD2c3VumglF6EKVE3A==&ch=necVNRTKtbN9OfUHlb1Uuoxphph1_cLfj7F22kcvPlVCspsoyzqHbg==)
---
| Patriot,
Today marks the 176th anniversary of Florida's admission into the Union.
Since 1845 when our great state was founded, we have made great strides in becoming an integral part of America. We now propel our country forward with the 4th largest economy, which is thanks to hard-working Floridians like you.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GoN_1GW6n1frATktvw-nESDWFYZK9M4J-4vUHxbDoYUNd3kXtvOyb2GYquA-N4_OFPIbMKCRCMAeRHKS7O3jKpPHGTpBa__IJJChFuiqMNHNhPYC_K9MFh2jwnBjzcvdktT4q2lSMzm5fRlZ8KrVBf5hzXktTlixsWqMXI0pQkqNjhAf-XWrOK5rgA_AWRDz&c=5da0eRVu0i5SNJtE54UO9Wi1lmaTzHSrpqf2CD2c3VumglF6EKVE3A==&ch=necVNRTKtbN9OfUHlb1Uuoxphph1_cLfj7F22kcvPlVCspsoyzqHbg==)
---
| As we move forward, I hope to count on your confidence and support as I continue to work for Florida's success. Together, we can preserve our self-reliance spirit and conservative values that both Florida and our country were founded on.
I know that we will overcome any and all challenges together and make sure Florida is a safe and prosperous place for generations to come.
Happy birthday, Florida!

For Florida, Team Cammack
[P.S. Please consider making a small donation of $10 to help Kat continue to work for Floridians in D.C.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GoN_1GW6n1frATktvw-nESDWFYZK9M4J-4vUHxbDoYUNd3kXtvOyb2GYquA-N4_OdIwO4ts4HBfxJZvSu4Qxcr4TlD_xM2SfImwnIkS7VXduZiHnaZMSzSeN4xa0I3L2n_DSYvlAKcLz34HMI3bois8qttfHCUjbK4UvvQ9kNw8EPmFxHRtTUMl0SpjRQpbAoXNjLqd4U9o=&c=5da0eRVu0i5SNJtE54UO9Wi1lmaTzHSrpqf2CD2c3VumglF6EKVE3A==&ch=necVNRTKtbN9OfUHlb1Uuoxphph1_cLfj7F22kcvPlVCspsoyzqHbg==)

******** What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UVXXNJeAlJYbIXYuHWxHrdkMjHrt8vEb4tz3otowDFFb2eWsyWUXX4rtmNx5o6TTxcIV5OMiQ-aNaJuZ2c6NrzcAOxqvRaKv-ZH7vgguzvo74b_vyXy3-SkuI91gq9HzeW1pkz0MMKM=&c=1nVFaVtxo8YQtTpblfvBdtMlJGDMS_Nn24tYi0fd9Y_Vgc5Nt1VpXw==&ch=3-d5HhqDD7Z41iyw_mnoCS0Z_EPgf_ZPY99508Hl3KTr-Aytm607Ow==).

Your support has helped us start this year off strong and it's the #1 reason that we're able to do the things we're doing. But more importantly, did you see what Nancy Pelosi jammed through Congress at 2:00 AM this past weekend? Rather than prioritizing our children's mental health, _Pelosi decided to spend $140 million on San Francisco 's subways_. **How is that common sense, Friend?** I ran for Congress to clean up Washington and put an end to these political pork project funds. I promised Iowa that I would do everything I can to ensure we're putting our children, farmers, and veterans first before radical, nonsense proposals like these. Friend, join me in calling out Nancy Pelosi and the radical left. [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x752R9SREaxCEQ4iE0VUcrioiRs2ICuxy7fgfLOf1lFZ0PAjrkVS6A7PnCNLlPMMRX99YYFQmIyT6oAguGoxDqXR0uxjQQjedl6tAfeJEcPsJ9WGNEncRAZ2gRNclalrAai0q42jr8lMWX1KLmQ6rC5LU6MWrvZBu1zcBNM-cMeINJNenELJPTCqVccZThfys9MVeLqsLbXqFYGAjERLKtTmpQmkQsLO4QJRqxBIxn5-EgPODKIGvk_6tDHTVcKiNgXjewP_1RyRgmoWoo7Iq4WI3--YxWexWNSmvpBt35U6QPMVWgN9KbS-wLjWS_bYaHrNqQWslZCLxup0SQ0VY6cbwekJ8fKDv_v1ONfLp2qYMduW_01gAXMZKA6o7rfuCvH1_H929Khu2mvK8tXm_2UATONs6jf5&c=c1afqcwfcwH6--5t10wa1gAzYfgvDepubsrmC1tauU_AkbWHAMn7mw==&ch=q5PK7j5kM6RD3SMGJ3CNU8dllZQ1j5abZMIKgDTOUkswvzGIIWNmmg==)
Friend,

**For almost a year, Ohioans have suffered due to misinformation from Governor Mike DeWine, Amy Acton, and Anthony Fauci,** who think they are better at making decisions than moms and dads, small business owners, and faith leaders. Because of them, the freedoms, liberties, and livelihoods of everyday Ohioans have been trampled for far too long.

[ _**Today, I 'm calling for Ohio to fully re-open and allow Ohioans to get back to work, get their kids back to school, and remove our statewide mask mandate.**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x752R9SREaxCEQ4iE0VUcrioiRs2ICuxy7fgfLOf1lFZ0PAjrkVS6A7PnCNLlPMMRX99YYFQmIyT6oAguGoxDqXR0uxjQQjedl6tAfeJEcPsJ9WGNEncRAZ2gRNclalrAai0q42jr8lMWX1KLmQ6rC5LU6MWrvZBu1zcBNM-cMeINJNenELJPTCqVccZThfys9MVeLqsLbXqFYGAjERLKtTmpQmkQsLO4QJRqxBIxn5-EgPODKIGvk_6tDHTVcKiNgXjewP_1RyRgmoWoo7Iq4WI3--YxWexWNSmvpBt35U6QPMVWgN9KbS-wLjWS_bYaHrNqQWslZCLxup0SQ0VY6cbwekJ8fKDv_v1ONfLp2qYMduW_01gAXMZKA6o7rfuCvH1_H929Khu2mvK8tXm_2UATONs6jf5&c=c1afqcwfcwH6--5t10wa1gAzYfgvDepubsrmC1tauU_AkbWHAMn7mw==&ch=q5PK7j5kM6RD3SMGJ3CNU8dllZQ1j5abZMIKgDTOUkswvzGIIWNmmg==)

**I 'm calling on Governor DeWine to:

\- Remove the statewide mask mandate
\- Remove all restrictions on businesses including capacity limits
\- Require that all schools open for in-person instruction
\- Re-open Ohio so that our businesses and communities can thrive**

_Are you with me, Friend?_

**[**RE-OPEN OHIO - SIGN THE PETITION NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x752R9SREaxCEQ4iE0VUcrioiRs2ICuxy7fgfLOf1lFZ0PAjrkVS6A7PnCNLlPMMRX99YYFQmIyT6oAguGoxDqXR0uxjQQjedl6tAfeJEcPsJ9WGNEncRAZ2gRNclalrAai0q42jr8lMWX1KLmQ6rC5LU6MWrvZBu1zcBNM-cMeINJNenELJPTCqVccZThfys9MVeLqsLbXqFYGAjERLKtTmpQmkQsLO4QJRqxBIxn5-EgPODKIGvk_6tDHTVcKiNgXjewP_1RyRgmoWoo7Iq4WI3--YxWexWNSmvpBt35U6QPMVWgN9KbS-wLjWS_bYaHrNqQWslZCLxup0SQ0VY6cbwekJ8fKDv_v1ONfLp2qYMduW_01gAXMZKA6o7rfuCvH1_H929Khu2mvK8tXm_2UATONs6jf5&c=c1afqcwfcwH6--5t10wa1gAzYfgvDepubsrmC1tauU_AkbWHAMn7mw==&ch=q5PK7j5kM6RD3SMGJ3CNU8dllZQ1j5abZMIKgDTOUkswvzGIIWNmmg==)**
---

**It 's time we remove ALL restrictions on Ohioans and allow our families and communities to make decisions without the heavy hand of government crippling their liberties any longer.**

[_**Join me TODAY in calling on Governor Dewine to RE-OPEN OHIO >>**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x752R9SREaxCEQ4iE0VUcrioiRs2ICuxy7fgfLOf1lFZ0PAjrkVS6A7PnCNLlPMMRX99YYFQmIyT6oAguGoxDqXR0uxjQQjedl6tAfeJEcPsJ9WGNEncRAZ2gRNclalrAai0q42jr8lMWX1KLmQ6rC5LU6MWrvZBu1zcBNM-cMeINJNenELJPTCqVccZThfys9MVeLqsLbXqFYGAjERLKtTmpQmkQsLO4QJRqxBIxn5-EgPODKIGvk_6tDHTVcKiNgXjewP_1RyRgmoWoo7Iq4WI3--YxWexWNSmvpBt35U6QPMVWgN9KbS-wLjWS_bYaHrNqQWslZCLxup0SQ0VY6cbwekJ8fKDv_v1ONfLp2qYMduW_01gAXMZKA6o7rfuCvH1_H929Khu2mvK8tXm_2UATONs6jf5&c=c1afqcwfcwH6--5t10wa1gAzYfgvDepubsrmC1tauU_AkbWHAMn7mw==&ch=q5PK7j5kM6RD3SMGJ3CNU8dllZQ1j5abZMIKgDTOUkswvzGIIWNmmg==)

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: 10 years ago
body:
Ten years ago, I came closing to losing my life when a would-be assassin opened fire on me
#

Friends -
For many of us, the new year is usually a time for optimism and new commitments. For me, it's a difficult yet powerful occasion for reflection. Ten years ago last month, I came close to losing my life. I was hosting a "Congress on Your Corner" event outside a Safeway store. A would-be assassin opened fire on me and my constituents, killing six and injuring thirteen others.
My recovery has been challenging and filled with difficult setbacks. They require me to find the courage to keep pushing myself to move forward, day after day. After all these years, I've learned that it's not the setback that defines us, but how we respond.
So instead of focusing on what I can't do, I've tried to set tougher and tougher goals for myself at every stage of my recovery.
The toughest challenge of all is the one Mark and I started to tackle on January 8, 2013 -- eight years ago -- when we launched a new organization, now named Giffords, to make our communities safer from gun violence.
I would have never believed that what we started with an Op-Ed in USA Today would have grown into the nationwide powerhouse it is today. That we would successfully lobby Congress and states across the country to act. That our message of common sense and responsibility would resonate with millions of Americans -- from red states and blue states, gun owners and non-gun owners alike, all committed to saving lives from gun violence.
We have seen great successes along the way:
* We have helped pass more than 400 gun safety laws in 45 states. There are people alive today, families that are still whole, because of the work we've done on this issue.
* We've helped elect champions for gun violence prevention to statehouses, governor's mansions, the House of Representatives, the United States Senate, and now, with President-elect Joe Biden's victory, to the White House.
* We've also helped defeat some of the gun lobby's greatest allies, flipping the House and making good on our promise that if the current Congress wouldn't work to change our gun laws, then we'd elect one that will.
* We've defended lifesaving gun laws in the courts and fought to debunk the gun lobby's dangerous argument that more guns in more places will make our country safer.
While I still cannot make sense of the terrible tragedy that changed my life forever 10 years ago, I know that something positive has come from that day. Because of your support and the work we've done together, I wake up every morning even more determined to make the most of my second chance at life, and my second chance at service.
Now, with a new president and a new Congress, we have new opportunities ahead of us.
Going forward, we'll keep fighting for progress. Sometimes victories will come quickly, and it will feel like the wind is at our backs. And at other times, the change will be slower than we'd like and we'll feel weary in the fight.
I know that feeling all too well. But know this:
Every single day, our movement grows stronger. Every single day we recruit more allies to the fight. Every single day we move closer to, not farther from, our goal of making our communities safer from gun violence.
Despite our setbacks, we know that it's how we respond -- how we keep fighting -- that defines us.
Thank you for being in this fight with me. If we're going to end the gun violence epidemic, there's only one way to do that:
Together.
All my best,
Gabby Giffords
**Gabby has dedicated her life 's work to making our communities safer from gun violence so no one will have to go through what she experienced 10 years ago. With a new president and a new Congress, now is our chance to make significant changes to our gun laws. And that means saving lives. But Gabby cannot do it alone.**
**[MAKE A $3 CONTRIBUTION TO GIFFORDS TODAY](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee1f1/78fba3aa/6023957b/50aace25/3654523374/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMDMtMS1udGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210303-1-ntl")**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee1f1/78fba3aa/6023957b/50aace25/3654523374/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTAzMDMtMS1udGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-march-21?refcode=em210303-1-ntl")**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee1f1/78fba3aa/6023957b/50aace24/3654523374/VEsF/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

subject: Why at 1:00AM?
body:
**This past weekend at 1:00AM, House Democrats passed their 1.9 TRILLION bailout package for liberal states.** The bill has millions of dollars for special transit projects in California and New York, billions of dollars schools do not receive for another 5 years, and funds rewarding states that have remained locked down.

body:
Have you seen Nancy Pelosi's latest effort to renew her caucus' plan for socialist America? This bill puts the integrity of our elections and our Democracy at stake.

**Have you seen Nancy Pelosi 's latest effort to renew her caucus' plan for socialist America? This bill puts the integrity of our elections and our Democracy at stake. Seriously, Friend--it's that bad!!**

Pelosi and House Democrats are jamming a bill through Congress that would allow the Federal Government (with President Biden's authority at its center of power) to dictate OUR national elections. It would also force states to allow vote-by-mail, give convicted felons voting rights, and the bill would punish conservatives that support conservative groups while simultaneously helping left wing campaign causes.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Winsome=20Sears?=
subject: I wanted to be sure you saw this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome Sears for Lt Gov
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/winsomesears/launch-email2?e=a4aff4086b)
---
| | | [ ](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=135967ed56&e=a4aff4086b)
---
| | | Friend,

I wanted you to be sure you heard about it...[**I have announced my candidacy to be the next Lieutenant Governor of the great Commonwealth of Virginia!**](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=cd8587fa35&e=a4aff4086b)

Like you, I am sick and tired of **politicians forgetting who they work for**. For far too long, our elected leaders in Richmond have disregarded our shared values for leftist policies that increase the size of government while decreasing our freedoms.

_I’m running for Lieutenant Governor because**adult decisions need to be made**. Democrat politicians have been playing games with our lives._ When I served in the House of Delegates, I wanted my constituents to know that whatever power I held was derived from them, therefore, I was to be their servant-leader and only answerable to them.

I am a former _United States Marine_. I am [_**unapologetically pro-life**_](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=23e5ad50c9&e=a4aff4086b) and [**_an ardent supporter of our 2nd Amendment rights_**](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=776c303d48&e=a4aff4086b). Furthermore, I believe our parental right to [_**school choice**_](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=eecde6c6f4&e=a4aff4086b) ought to be restored, along with the [_**integrity of the ballot box**_](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=1067d3fd8a&e=a4aff4086b).

But, you most likely know me as a small business owner, Christian prison ministry leader, a devoted wife, and a loving mother (and grandmother). These experiences helped define me as a **public servant** and I will apply them when I serve as our next Lieutenant Governor.

I hope you’ll take a few moments to watch my announcement video by [clicking here](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=78b68762d2&e=a4aff4086b) or on the image below.
---
| [ ](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=a588d6ff0d&e=a4aff4086b)
---
| I am thankful for your friendship and your support. I’ve been in public life before and I truly see it as service, not a means for a political career. I pledge to always keep truth as my foundation—and not power.

**So stand with me and together we will bring back our conservative values and common sense. **

Semper Fi.

Winsome Sears
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor

PS - In order to make sure that as many Virginians as possible see this video, I need your help! A $25 donation will help me reach 42 voters. **CLICK[HERE](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=7ccbedc1f7&e=a4aff4086b) TO CHIP IN [$25](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=7a48bcae24&e=a4aff4086b), [$10](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=f0b75269a4&e=a4aff4086b), OR EVEN [$3](https://winsomesears.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d6ecd53c92947bd8af82df2af&id=6efc7e0d11&e=a4aff4086b) RIGHT AWAY! **\-- W.S.
---
| | | Paid for by Winsome Sears for Lt Gov
---
|
---

| | Friends-

Just another day in Nancy Pelosi's Washington D.C. where the democrats are choosing politics and insiders above Americans. Today Pelosi's top disaster was on the floor and I had the opportunity to tell them how I felt on the floor.

---
| | |
---
| | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZuaWNvbGVtYWxsaW90YWtpcy5jb20lMkZtYWxsaW90YWtpcy10YXhwYXllci1tb25leS1mb3ItY2FtcGFpZ25zLWlzLXdyb25nLWFuZC1pbmVmZmVjdGl2ZSUyRiUzRnV0bV9zb3VyY2UlM0RlbWFpbCUyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW0lM0RtZXNzYWdlJTI2dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduJTNESG9sZCUyQk9uJTJCVG8lMkJZb3VyJTJCV2FsbGV0cyUyQkVtYWls&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=458A645A1A8933)
---
| | |
---
| | To sum up my floor speech this bill would:

* Take your tax dollars to fund campaigns.
* Allow convicted felons to vote
* Make it harder to protect our elections from fraud and irregularities.
* Ban voter ID
* Allow same day voter registration without giving election boards proper time to confirm eligibility

But there is still hope:
Republicans in the senate are likely to stop this bill cold, and with my work on the Save Democracy Act we can still restore faith in elections.

[I am going to keep fighting for you and continue to stack small wins like ripping Pelosi's train out of the "Covid Relief Bill." ](https://nicolemalliotakis.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZuaWNvbGVtYWxsaW90YWtpcy5jb20lMkZtYWxsaW90YWtpcy10YXhwYXllci1tb25leS1mb3ItY2FtcGFpZ25zLWlzLXdyb25nLWFuZC1pbmVmZmVjdGl2ZSUyRiUzRnV0bV9zb3VyY2UlM0RlbWFpbCUyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW0lM0RtZXNzYWdlJTI2dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduJTNESG9sZCUyQk9uJTJCVG8lMkJZb3VyJTJCV2FsbGV0cyUyQkVtYWls&a=25864240&account=nicolemalliotakis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=458A645A1A8933)
